name: Wealth
description: While the boundaries between civilizations are thick with animosity and blood - money always finds a way. Though most civilizations boast their own official sources of coin, the shared nature of life around the Wellspring has led to a standard currency that is accepted almost universally (and often with much grumbling), and can buy all manner of things - both legal and illegal. Copper Hexagon, “Copper” - 1 Wealth Silver Circle, “Silver” - 5 Wealth Gold Oval, “Gold” - 10 Wealth Green Arch, “Greens” - 50 Wealth In the recent past, the need for supplies led Auros to use a barter system of resources, but after their arrival at the Wellspring, they will begin to use the universal currency going forward as the pressures of trade and economies weave their way across the border. To reflect this, at check-in, starting Aurosian characters may choose to receive their first game’s Wealth either in coin, or in Basic Resources. NOTE: The resources will be diversified and cannot be chosen individually, and will reflect the merchant prices of the resources (see below). Below is a typical selection of items that may be for sale and their average prices in the world. NOTE: These prices include a markup, and will always be more expensive than the base values of the items gathered or crafted in-game - keep this in mind when trading with other player characters. In addition, NPC merchants will not always be available. Some character skills or Powers may affect the merchant markup, as well as other in-game circumstances. Basic Resource (Bloom, Ingot, Hide)                                2 for 3 Wealth Uncommon Resource (Night Prize, Rare Mineral, Harvest)        3 Wealth Mithril Ore                                                         10 Wealth Raw Scale                                                        10 Wealth Ritual Wand                                                        9 Wealth Ritual Powder                                                        18 Wealth Golden Blossom Seed                                                30 Wealth Essence Infusion                                                35 Wealth Other Crafted Items                                                Calculated based on components
